wishes.text: a bridge over the mill stream, so the far side stops being far
wishes.closed_on: the night the stone was laid

pledges.what: a match struck on the new stone the day it is laid
pledges.redeemed_on: the night the stone was laid

accounting.note: filed under owed, not granted — the book's first debt
the stone counted out loud instead of in her head, and the debt closed at compound interest

wishes.text: warm bread on every doorstep through the cold months
wishes.recorded_on: the eve of the first frost

pledges.what: a share of the orchard's last apples for the ovens

accounting.on: the eve of the first frost
accounting.note: filed under owed; the town has not yet answered

wishes.text: a goose that lays a gold egg each morning

accounting.note: filed under insincere; the coin returned to the sill it came from
